positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for james_lunch_company_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~appears_in_company(james)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~is_manager(james)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_at_home(X0) | ~has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_lunch_in_company(james)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~is_manager(X0) | ~works_remotely_from_home(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    has_lunch_at_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    works_remotely_from_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_at_home(X0) | works_remotely_from_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define schedules_meeting_with_customer(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define goes_to_company_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
